name: tormentnexus
description: TormentNexus AI control plane — persistent L2 vector memory, semantic tool discovery, imported sessions, skill registry, code search, subagent orchestration

interface.shortDescription: TormentNexus AI control plane with L2 memory, tool discovery, and code search
interface.longDescription: TormentNexus is a local AI control plane running on port 7778 with persistent L2 vector memory, semantic tool discovery across 20+ MCP servers, imported sessions, and a skill registry. Connect via MCP stdio to access memory tools, tool routing, and code intelligence.
